message:
chore(beads): sync issues.jsonl — close shipped test-pinning beads, add follow-ups

Routine state sync from the beads tracker. The diff is exclusively
status transitions and new issue rows generated by the agent swarm
that has been working through the test-pinning backlog tonight; no
existing issue bodies were edited.

Closures (status: open → closed) reflect work that landed in tonight's
21 ahead commits plus the new test additions in this push:

- 4nh3d — fcp-core CRDT 3-replica merge + tombstone semantics
  (resolved by 74bee1fc1)
- 5xa4o — fcp-cbor array length-prefix encoding boundaries
- 8zagc — fcp-host CapabilityToken typestate runtime contract
  (resolved by f1b3d50f2)
- 9gtbl — fcp-streaming reconnection backoff schedule pin
- 4f0f9 — fcp-cbor simple-value encoding (true/false/null/undefined)
  (assigned to cod3, just landed)

Additions are next-up test-pinning candidates queued for the swarm
(e.g. 5r5it — fcp-streaming backoff jitter bounds with fixed seed).
None were edited in-place; they are net-new rows appended at the
bottom of the JSONL file.

The file is the canonical machine-readable form of the project's
beads tracker; committing keeps `.beads/issues.jsonl` aligned with
the local SQLite store so other agents pulling main get the same view.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
